transactions: 07/11 — Los Angeles Dodgers sent RHP Edwin Díaz on a rehab assignment to Ontario Tower Buzzers.
07/11 — Pittsburgh Pirates sent RHP Wilber Dotel on a rehab assignment to Indianapolis Indians.
07/11 — Athletics placed 1B Nick Kurtz on the 10-day injured list retroactive to July 10, 2026. Right thumb capsule sprain.
07/11 — Tulsa Drillers placed CF Mike Sirota on the temporarily inactive list.
07/11 — National League Futures activated CF Mike Sirota.
07/13 — American League All-Stars activated RHP Cam Schlittler.
07/13 — American League All-Stars activated 1B Nick Kurtz.
07/13 — American League All-Stars activated 3B Junior Caminero.
07/13 — National League All-Stars activated LF Juan Soto.
07/13 — National League All-Stars activated C Drake Baldwin.
07/13 — National League All-Stars activated 1B Sal Stewart.
07/13 — National League All-Stars activated RHP Yoshinobu Yamamoto.
07/13 — American League All-Stars activated LF Riley Greene.
